activity_summary: An intake coordinator reviews administrative appointment readiness and decides schedule, return missing forms, or escalate insurance verification.
command_display: lms chat google/gemma-4-e2b --system-prompt You generate one static product UI candidate for a JudgmentKit comparison fixture. Return one valid JSON object only. Do not use Markdown fences. Do not include scripts, external assets, remote fonts, or external image URLs. Respect the context boundary described in the user prompt. --prompt <prompt> --ttl 300 --yes
notes: Gemma 4 (local LLM) output captured through lms for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: This interface allows an intake coordinator to review administrative readiness for a patient appointment, determine required documentation or verification steps, and decide on scheduling or escalation.

surface.heading: Appointment Readiness Review (Case I-4471)

selected.request: Appointment packet is pending administrative readiness review.

evidence: Signed consent form is missing before scheduling.
surface.policy: Schedule only when required administrative forms are complete; insurance uncertainty goes to verification staff. Do not diagnose, triage, or recommend treatment.
surface.decision_title: Action Required: Return Missing Consent Form

handoff.title: Document Return
handoff.reason: Missing signed consent form is required to proceed with scheduling.
